g.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
g.text: Self-hosted GitHub issue triage. One Docker Compose stack. Everything on boxes the operator controls.

g.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
g.text: EXTERNAL SYSTEMS · not part of the deployment
Security headers: X-Frame-Options · X-Content-Type-Options · Referrer-Policy · Permissions-Policy · server_tokens off
App Router · Inter · Tailwind · TanStack Query
Runs as uid 1000 · :8000 internally · SLA watcher as lifespan task
/ingest/feedback public key + origin allowlist + rate limit
PII redactor (pre-LLM) SSRF guard on outbound URLs
Fernet encrypt at rest (user keys) Session cookie: HttpOnly + SameSite=Lax
Every 60s · Redis SET NX EX 55 claim · scan breached cards · notify Slack + audit
Listens on queues: default · triage · indexing DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker-proxy:2375
triage · feedback_triage · indexing · codeowners · slack · backfill · analyze
• PII redactor runs on issue_title + issue_body before classify / dedup / comment prompts
• Recent operator corrections fetched once, rendered into classify.j2 + comment.j2
• Write triage_cards + llm_usage rows (cost by step / provider / model)
• Rules engine applies: assignees · labels · notify_slack · sla_minutes
• Fan out Slack (new_card · regression · rule_match) via destination-filtered notifier
• On approve: GitHub comment / label / assign · optional Jira create · Slack approved
ISOLATED EXECUTION · reproduction sandbox for LLM-authored scripts
• /var/run/docker.sock mounted here ONLY · read-only · never on worker / backend
• Allowed API surface: CONTAINERS=1, IMAGES=1, POST=1, DELETE=1
• Denied: networks · volumes · info · exec · services · swarm · secrets · events
• Worker reaches it over compose network TCP :2375
Sandbox · ephemeral per reproduction · python:3.11-slim / node:20-slim
Script passed via -c / -e · never written to disk · ARG_MAX (~2MB) >> script cap (5KB)
Stdout/stderr captured and truncated to 16k chars in triage_cards.reproduction_log
Docker API (scoped) · create · start · wait · logs · remove
Async SQLAlchemy 2.0 · asyncpg · Alembic migrations · bugsift_session healthcheck
redis-py async · RQ · rate-limit counters · distributed locks
GitHub API · App JWT / install token
bugsift/docs/architecture.svg · companion to docs/architecture.md · regenerate when services or tables change
